raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The COVID-19 pandemic has led to an unprecedented rise in substance use.",
    "There have been well-documented abuses of vulnerable patients in substance abuse treatment facilities, including death and serious injury.",
    "Guaranteeing minimum insurance coverage levels will better protect patients in treatment facilities.",
    "Californians seeking help for alcohol and substance use need additional consumer protections during the pandemic.",
    "Requiring minimum insurance standards and reporting of injuries and deaths will enable investigators to protect public health and safety.",
    "Media reports detail business practices that exploit patients for profits in the addiction treatment industry.",
    "AB 1158 will require recovery residences that contract with government entities to maintain minimum insurance coverage levels.",
    "AB 1158 will enhance the ability of state regulatory agencies to investigate insurance complaints and prevent fraud in recovery facilities."
  ]
}
```
